---
title: "The Theory of Quantum Information: Notes"
number-sections: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

# Chapter 1: Mathematical Preliminaries {#chapter-1}

{{< include notes/chapter1/_1.1-linear-algebra.qmd >}}

{{< include notes/chapter1/_1.2-analysis.qmd >}}

# Chapter 2: Basic Notions {#chapter-2}

{{< include notes/chapter2/_2.1-registers.qmd >}}

{{< include notes/chapter2/_2.2-channels.qmd >}}

{{< include notes/chapter2/_2.3-measurements.qmd >}}
